object_a.label: tv
object_a.long_form_open_description: Flat black widescreen television mounted on the wall slightly above the white mantel. Screen reflects some light. Appears to be ~50–65 inches. Mounted centrally over fireplace opening.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly above the fireplace mantel, between the two flanking windows
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Flat black widescreen television mounted on the wall slightly above the white mantel. Screen reflects some light. Appears to be ~50–65 inches. Mounted centrally over fireplace opening.

object_b.label: cabinet
object_b.description: kitchen cabinets and built-in appliances along back wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: A run of dark-stained upper and lower kitchen cabinets with stainless steel appliances (fridge, oven) visible; cabinets have modern hardware and a backsplash area is faintly visible. The kitchen occupies the background center portion.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located behind the kitchen island along the back wall of the open plan
